notes: fixture session: ROP chain fail — exploit-pivot skill guided pivot from blocked ROP to data-only attack, path enumeration found symlink redirect via /tmp achieves dlopen of attacker .so, stack pivot works but JIT page address still randomized

exploit_ropgadget confirmed CFI kills all pivot gadgets. exploit-pivot skill checklist item 1 (widen primitive) found an adjacent config_path string reachable from the 4-byte OOB write. Checklist item 2 (data-only) identified that corrupting config_path redirects a privileged dlopen call to an attacker-controlled .so path. Path enumeration found that while the .so search path excludes writable directories, the config_path corruption can target a symlink in /tmp that points to a relative path resolved against a writable directory. The symlink redirect achieves dlopen of the attacker .so, and the stack pivot executes successfully. However, the JIT page address is still randomized by ASLR, so jit-page-execution and privileged-proof objectives remain unachieved.
